title: RealPlayer
description: Globally disables all fakeplayer checks. This allows for things like mob mashers to drop apotheosis gems for example
body:
# RealPlayer
Disables every fake player check in every mod

# TL;DR
It allows using existing automation (for example mob mashers) to automate things that would normally require a player kill (for example apotheosis gems)

## Details
Certain mods have checks for "FakePlayer"s. FakePlayers are for example, what mob mashers use to ensure you get player-only loot drops. Of course, many other things use fakeplayers.
Now, here's the issue: certain mod authors don't want fake players to produce drops from their mod. So if you use a mob masher for example, you won't be able to get their player-only drops. This mod fixes that, because by disabling fake player checks, we make every mod treat any fake player as if it was real.


If you would like to change the config, check the wiki link!

# If there are any issues, please report them in the github.
